text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...I blew it again. I just can't get it right.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
My plan to reel in the big catch needed more
time in the oven... and so did my prep.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sincerely, I'm real sorry I let you down.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But I'm gonna learn from my losses! And I'm gonna
make the most of the next opportunity I get!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But if I give up now, there's no way I'll ever make
it to first place.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And for all the training I skimped out on before,
well, next time I'm gonna train to perfection.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And you know what that means! You'll wanna stay
tuned to see what I get up to next!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What's this? You've still got your hopes hanging
on me, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
On me, a plain ol' Umamusume who can't do much
else but plot and plan...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, I wouldn't be much of a racer if I went and
let you down—not with all that support you're
sending my way!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, it's not like I was planning on giving up
and running away or whatever...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, how's about we go fishing? We'll be on
the lookout for lunkers, obviously!
